## Summary
Describe the change in one paragraph.

## Change Type
- [ ] Constitution change
- [ ] Policy change
- [ ] Governance docs clarification
- [ ] Repo meta / workflow change

## Reason
Why is this change needed?

## Scope
List the exact files and paths changed.

## Risk Level
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Approval Requirement
- [ ] Owner approval required
- [ ] Owner approval already granted

## Validation
- [ ] Paths reviewed
- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No protected rule bypass introduced
- [ ] No contradiction with Constitution

## Notes
Additional context, rollback notes, or future follow-up.
